MeasurementToolMetadata.Description: The Penn Computerized Neurobehavioral Battery (CNB) is an online cognitive assessment consisting of a series of tasks that measure accuracy and speed of performance in major cognitive domains.

session_id.Description: BIDS session label assigned chronologically via Flywheel created timestamp

cnb_volt_rtcr.LongName: VOLT Median Response Time for Correct Responses

cnb_volt_w_rtcr.LongName: VOLT Weighted Median Response Time for Correct Responses

cnb_volt_rter.LongName: VOLT Median Response Time for Incorrect Responses

cnb_volt_w_rter.LongName: VOLT Weighted Median Response Time for Incorrect Responses

cnb_volt_rt.LongName: VOLT Median Response Time for All Responses

cnb_volt_tprt.LongName: VOLT Median Response Time for True Positive Responses

cnb_volt_tnrt.LongName: VOLT Median Response Time for True Negative Responses

cnb_volt_fprt.LongName: VOLT Median Response Time for False Positive Responses

cnb_volt_fnrt.LongName: VOLT Median Response Time for False Negative Responses

cnb_volt_cnt_200.LongName: VOLT Total Count of Responses Under 200 milliseconds

cnb_volt_lrsr.LongName: VOLT Longest Run of Same Responses

cnb_volt_valid_code.LongName: Validation Code for entire Short Visual Object Learning Test (VOLT)

Levels.F: Likely valid, problem occurred which affected performance for a limited number of responses/mild to moderate effect
